zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Horsley於1316年出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，她的父親John Horsley26歲，母親Mrs. John Horsley28歲。她於1334年與Thomas of Bradford Wetewode在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1409年享年93歲。

zh-hans.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Horsley于1316年出生在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，她的父亲John Horsley26岁，母亲Mrs. John Horsley28岁。她于1334年与Thomas of Bradford Wetewode在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1409年享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Horsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northeastern England): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hors ‘horse’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, such as Horsley (Derbyshire, Gloucestershire), Long Horsley (Northumberland), and Horseley Hills Farm in Wolverley (Worcestershire), probably referring to a place where horses were put out to pasture.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Horsley was born in 1316, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, her father, John Horsley, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. John Horsley, was 28. She married Thomas of Bradford Wetewode in 1334, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1409, at the age of 93.

Elle a épousé Thomas of Bradford Wetewode en 1334, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1409, à l’âge de 93 ans.

ja.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Horsleyが1316年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父John Horsleyは26歳，母Mrs. John Horsleyは28歳であった。1334年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでThomas of Bradford Wetewodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1409年に93歳で死去した。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Horsley(이)가 1316년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Horsley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Horsley(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Thomas of Bradford Wetewode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Horsley родилась в 1316 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John Horsley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Horsley, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas of Bradford Wetewode в 1334 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1409 г. в возрасте 93 лет.
